items.title: Voices from the Community: Forewords and Praise for 'Docker and Kubernetes Security'
items.description: When I decided to self-publish Docker and Kubernetes Security in early 2025, I never imagined the incredible support from the community that would follow. From Docker Captains to industry leaders, the book has received heartfelt forewords and glowing reviews that have truly humbled me.</

items.description:

Most programmers spend years learning how to make software work.

items.title: How I Automated My Obsidian Vault with Claude — It Now Works the Night Shift
items.description:
I was drowning in my own notes

For about two years, I lived inside Obsidian. Daily notes, fleeting thoughts, meeting takeaways, half-formed ideas at 2am, voice memos I'd transcribe by hand. My vault had over 3,000 notes.

And I remembered almost none of it.

items.title: The hidden cost of cloud GPU training: egress, idle time, and lock-in
items.description:
The GPU hourly rate is the number everyone compares. It is also the number that tells you the least about what a training run actually costs.

items.description: React Native developers have long dealt with the friction of bridging JavaScript with native UI threads.
